rate_breakdown.name: Climate Action Transport Targeted Rate - Urban Residential
rate_breakdown.description: A targeted rate to help fund the capital and operational costs for reducing greenhouse gas emissions and adapting to the impact of climate change.

rate_breakdown.name: Rodney Local Board Transport Targeted Rate
rate_breakdown.description: A targeted rate to help fund the costs of additional transport investment and services in the Rodney local board area.

rate_breakdown.name: Water Quality Targeted Rate - Non Business
rate_breakdown.description: A targeted rate to help fund the capital costs of investment in cleaning up Auckland's waterways.

rate_breakdown.name: Waste Management - Standard Recycling
rate_breakdown.description: A targeted rate that funds recycling collection.

rate_breakdown.name: Uniform Annual General Charge
rate_breakdown.description: A fixed charge for each separately used / inhabited part of a rating unit that funds general council activities including parks, pools, libraries and footpaths.

rate_breakdown.name: Waste Management - Minimum Base Charge
rate_breakdown.description: A targeted rate that funds inorganic collection service, resource recovery centres & other regional waste services.

rate_breakdown.name: Natural Environment Targeted Rate - Non Business
rate_breakdown.description: A targeted rate to help fund the capital and operating costs of investment to deliver enhanced environmental outcomes.

rate_breakdown.name: Waste Management - Refuse Standard RDC
rate_breakdown.description: A targeted rate that funds 120/140 litre bin (or equivalent) refuse collection commencing September 2025.

rate_breakdown.name: General Rate - Urban Residential
rate_breakdown.description: A rate based on your rating unit's use and whether its location is urban or rural, that funds general council activities including parks, pools, libraries and footpaths.

rate_breakdown.name: Waste Management - Food Scraps Service
rate_breakdown.description: A targeted rate to help fund the food scraps collection service.
